jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Cashfree
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
